title: BLUELIGHT RAT: YARA PDB Path Indicators
description: Detects BLUELIGHT compilation artifacts (PDB paths) in process events or file content. Unique to BLUELIGHT: 'Development\BACKDOOR\ncov\' and 'Release\bluelight.pdb'. Source: Volexity YARA rule APT_MAL_Win_BlueLight.
query: ('Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Events' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Operational Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Windows Sysmon Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Security Events') and ('Original Log Content' like '%BACKDOOR%ncov%' or 'Original Log Content' like '%bluelight.pdb%') | stats count by 'Host Name (Server)', Entity, 'Process Name'
falsepositives: None expected - PDB paths are unique compilation artifacts
